free_text: Study of the B-11(p,pgamma)B-11 reactions for PIGE
The natural abundance of 11B is 80.1%, a thin B-nat
target on a tantalum backing was used for the cross-
section measurements. The thicknesses of the B-nat
target was found to be 577E+15 at/cm**2.
a 1000 mum thick surface barrier detector (SSB)
Statistical uncertainty due to peak integration
Data received from K.Preketes-Sigalas via NDS
